vision: A distraction-free mobile application that enables individuals to efficiently capture, track, and complete daily tasks without unnecessary complexity.

epics.name: Task Creation & Management
epics.description: Core functionality enabling users to create, edit, and delete tasks with optional due dates

stories.title: Create a new task with title
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to create a new task with a title, so that I can capture things I need to do
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list screen When I tap the add task button and enter a title and confirm Then a new task appears in my task list with the entered title
Given I am creating a new task When I leave the title field empty and try to confirm Then the task is not created and I see a validation message

stories.title: Add optional due date to task
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to set an optional due date when creating a task, so that I can stay accountable to deadlines
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a new task When I tap on the due date field Then I can select a date from a date picker
Given I am creating a new task When I skip the due date field and confirm Then the task is created without a due date

stories.title: Delete a task from the list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to delete a task, so that I can remove items I no longer need to track
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a task in my list When I initiate the delete action on that task Then the task is removed from my list
Given I initiate a delete action When I am prompted for confirmation and I confirm Then the task is permanently deleted
stories.notes: Walking skeleton requires ability to remove test data

stories.title: Edit task title and due date
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to edit a task's title and due date after creation, so that I can fix typos or adjust deadlines
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an existing task When I tap on the task to edit it Then I can modify the title and save changes
Given I am editing a task with a due date When I change or remove the due date and save Then the task reflects the updated due date
stories.notes: Marked as assumed requirement in document

epics.name: Task Completion
epics.description: Functionality to mark tasks as complete and track completion status

stories.title: Mark a task as complete
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to mark a task as complete, so that I can track my progress and know what's done
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an incomplete task When I tap the completion control Then the task is marked as complete with visual feedback
Given I have a completed task When I view it in the list Then it displays with a visual distinction from incomplete tasks

stories.title: Unmark a completed task as incomplete
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to unmark a completed task, so that I can restore a task I marked complete by mistake
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a completed task When I tap the completion control again Then the task is marked as incomplete
Given I unmark a task as incomplete When I view the task list Then the task appears as an active incomplete task
stories.notes: Implied by needing to fix mistakes

epics.name: Task List View
epics.description: Display and visualization of tasks in a clear, scannable list format

stories.title: View all tasks in single list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to view all my tasks in a single list, so that I have visibility into everything I need to do
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created tasks When I open the app Then I see all my tasks displayed in a list
Given I have no tasks When I open the app Then I see an empty state indicating no tasks exist

stories.title: Visual distinction for task completion status
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to see a clear visual difference between complete and incomplete tasks, so that I can quickly scan my list
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I view the task list Then completed tasks display with strikethrough or muted styling
Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I view the task list Then incomplete tasks display with normal prominent styling
stories.notes: Marked as assumed requirement in document

epics.name: Task Filtering
epics.description: Ability to filter the task list by completion status

stories.title: Filter to show only incomplete tasks
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter my list to show only incomplete tasks, so that I can focus on what still needs to be done
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I apply the incomplete filter Then only incomplete tasks are displayed
Given I have the incomplete filter active When a new task is created Then it appears in the filtered list

stories.title: Filter to show only completed tasks
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter my list to show only completed tasks, so that I can review what I've accomplished
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I apply the completed filter Then only completed tasks are displayed
Given I have the completed filter active When I mark a task complete Then it appears in the filtered list

stories.title: Clear filter to show all tasks
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to clear any active filter, so that I can see all my tasks again
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a filter active When I clear the filter Then all tasks are displayed regardless of completion status
Given I have cleared the filter When I view the list Then the default all-tasks view is shown

epics.name: Data Persistence
epics.description: Local storage of task data to ensure tasks survive app closure

stories.title: Persist tasks locally on device
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want my tasks to be saved on my device, so that I don't lose my data when I close the app
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created tasks When I close and reopen the app Then all my tasks are still present
Given I have marked tasks complete When I close and reopen the app Then the completion status is preserved
stories.notes: Essential for walking skeleton to be usable

stories.title: Load task list instantly up to 100 tasks
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want my task list to load instantly, so that I can quickly capture or check tasks without waiting
acceptance_criteria: Given I have up to 100 tasks stored When I open the app Then the task list displays within 500 milliseconds
Given I have 100 tasks When I scroll through the list Then there is no perceivable lag or delay
